description: CompositionNavy blue and cobalt blue men&rsquo s soccer backpack made of nylon, with two main compartments and dual colour wide, cushioned shoulder straps Perfect for soccer players, this navy and cobalt blue PES plain weave backpack from adidas has ample space to Fit in all your belongings. Made of nylon, it has strength and durability, which also makes it a great bag for weekend expeditions and getaways. The broad base ensures it stands firm on the ground while the cushioned, broad shoulder straps spread the weight evenly, ensuring your back and shoulders are not injured.
